disputed_language: AWS guidance identifies OU-level security-control application as generally preferable to account-level application because it simplifies policy management and troubleshooting.
explanation: The cited 'Apply security controls to OUs rather than accounts' section supports more efficient distribution of controls across accounts with similar requirements, but it does not state the claim's troubleshooting rationale. The separately registered official source 'Best practices for managing organizational units (OUs) with AWS Organizations,' under 'Recommended foundational organizational unit (OUs),' does state that OU-level policy application simplifies policy management and potential troubleshooting. The full current claim is therefore not supported by its exact cited source and locator.
required_action: Revise the claim to cite src-b-ou-practices at 'Recommended foundational organizational unit (OUs)' for the troubleshooting proposition, or remove/narrow the unsupported troubleshooting language; then revalidate and reverify the new exact digest.

supporting_source.locator: Apply security controls to OUs rather than accounts
supporting_source.title: Design principles for your multi-account strategy
